name: Gravitytai Co.,Ltd.
summary: Gravitytai Co.,Ltd. manufactures and distributes indium tin oxide (ITO) conductive films. Its products are used in the manufacture of touch panels of mobile phones, personal digital assistants, and other consumer electronic products, as well as navigation systems, laptops, keyboards, and other areas. The company distributes its products in Taiwan, Mainland China, South Korea, and Japan. Gravitytai Co.,Ltd. is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
